description: Governed corpus record (from the job sheet's Principals tab, ~58 rows). The solicitor / work provider that instructs CE. Matched to incoming mail BY EMAIL DOMAIN (no alias matching). Seeds Case/PO generation via principalCode. Referenced providers are never deleted -- deactivate/archive/merge with old IDs kept as history.

lifecycle.note: One of the four M1-live tables (read for matching in M1; full corpus seeded in Phase 1b).

primaryColumn.description: Solicitor / Work Provider name (job sheet 'Solicitor/Work Provider' column).

columns.description: ONE code (job sheet 'EVA Code / Box Code'): lowercase = EVA Code, UPPERCASE = Box Code & Case/PO prefix. Must be unique enough to keep Case/PO generation safe.
MATCHING KEY. Newline/JSON list of sender domains (after @) that map to this provider. Domain match only -- NO alias matching. Ambiguous (domain -> >1 active provider) blocks auto-match.
Inbox the provider's instructions normally arrive on (job sheet 'Inbox').
always_image_based | prefer_address | required_address. Drives the M1 address policy gate. prefer_address is the default for unknown providers.
manual | review_auto | full_auto. Only review_auto honored in M1.
Images location free-text (job sheet 'Images location'). 1b import.
Job sheet 'Drag in to EVA?' flag (preferred EVA path hint for this provider).
Per-provider toggle (MODELED, DEFERRED in M1 -- global env-var kill switches govern M1).
active|archived. Archived providers kept as history redirects (Case/PO history depends on old principal codes); never hard-deleted.

alternateKeys.description: Natural key for job-sheet upsert (re-import updates drafts, never overwrites an active record without change-reason + audit).

notes: The N:N to Repairer (ADR-0001) is defined in relationships.json (cr1bd_repairer_workprovider).
M1 honors only providerAutomationMode=review_auto; per-provider boolean toggles are deferred to global env-var gates.
